remarks: Expertly styled, 11 McLaren Rd S offers an exceptional blend of modern luxury, architectural elegance, and prime in-town living in one of Darien's most sought-after neighborhoods. Flooded with natural light, the bright and sunny open floor plan creates a warm, welcoming flow perfect for both daily life and sophisticated entertaining. The heart of the home is the top-of-the-line kitchen, featuring premium appliances, beautiful cabinetry, expansive counter space, and a large island. It opens seamlessly to the spacious living room with custom built-ins and a cozy fireplace-ideal for relaxing gatherings. Just off the kitchen sits a sophisticated den boasting dramatic cathedral ceilings and a second fireplace, adding height, warmth, and architectural character to the space. The formal dining room, conveniently located off the kitchen, includes sliders that open onto a beautiful bluestone patio overlooking a private, professionally landscaped backyard. This serene outdoor oasis is perfect for al fresco dining, entertaining, or quiet relaxation in complete privacy. Upstairs, the second level is thoughtfully divided for maximum flexibility and comfort. One wing offers a convenient sitting area, two generously sized bedrooms, and a full bathroom-ideal for guests, children, or a quiet retreat. The primary bedroom suite provides a luxurious private sanctuary, complemented by two additional bedrooms, bringing the total to five bedrooms.
